description: Curated plugins required by the WooCommerce Cloud core distribution. Every store in a cluster receives this set, so a plugin's per-request cost is multiplied by store count and its failures are network-wide.

excluded.reason: Measured ~250x per-request slowdown when network-activated: homepage 20.1s with, 0.08s without (Spike #009, scripts/spike/REPORT-009-provisioning-real-store.md). Root cause not identified; it is NOT an outbound API timeout — noc1.wordfence.com answered in 0.70s. Because it is network-activated the cost applies to every store in the cluster.
excluded.replacement: Perimeter protection instead of per-store plugin: Caddy rate limiting and CDN WAF (ADR-005 Protection layers 1-2). Security does not disappear, it moves to a layer that does not multiply by store count.
excluded.reinstate_if: Root cause found AND a pre-configured Distribution setup measures back to baseline latency.
